revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fantasy fiction]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fantasy fiction]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Fantasy fiction | title = [[:en:Fantasy|Fantasy fiction]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | listclass = hlist | bodystyle = text-align:center;
| above = * [[History of fantasy|History]] * [[Fantasy literature|Literature]] * [[:en:Magic in fiction|Magic]] * [[Early history of fantasy|Sources]]
| group1 = Subgenres | list1 = *[[:en:Accidental travel|Accidental travel]] * Action-adventure ** [[Lost world]] ** [[Sword and sorcery]] ** [[:en:Wuxia|Wuxia]] * [[:en:Alternate history|Alternate history]] *[[Chuanyue]] * [[Contemporary fantasy|Contemporary]] * [[Children's fantasy]] * [[:en:Fantasy comedy|Comedy]] ** [[:en:Bangsian fantasy|Bangsian]] * [[Dark fantasy]] ** [[Grimdark]] * [[Fairy tale parody|Fairy tale parodies]] * [[Fairytale fantasy]] * [[Fantastique]] * [[Fantasy of manners]] * [[Hard fantasy]] * [[High fantasy]] * [[:en:Historical fantasy|Historical fantasy]] * [[:en:Isekai|Isekai]] * [[LitRPG]] * [[Low fantasy]] * [[Magical girl]] * [[Mythic fiction|Mythic]] ** [[Mythpunk]] * [[Mythopoeia]] * [[Omegaverse]] * [[Progression fantasy|Progression]] * [[Romantic fantasy|Romantic]] * [[Science fantasy]] ** [[Dying Earth (genre)|Dying Earth]] ** [[Planetary romance]] * [[Gods and demons fiction|Shenmo]] * [[Urban fantasy]] ** [[Occult detective fiction]] ** [[Paranormal romance]] * [[Weird fiction]] ** [[New weird]] ** [[Weird West]] * [[Fantasy Western]] *[[Xianxia]] | group2 = Media | list2 = {{navbox|child | groupwidth = 7em | group1 = [[Fantasy film|Film]] and [[Fantasy television|television]] | list1 = * [[List of fantasy anime|Anime]] * [[Lists of fantasy films|Films]] ** [[List of highest-grossing fantasy films|highest-grossing]] ** [[List of sword and sorcery films|S&S]] * [[List of fantasy television programs|Television programs]]
| group2 = [[Fantasy literature|Literature]] | list2 = * [[List of fantasy authors|Authors]] * [[:en:Ballantine Adult Fantasy series|Ballantine Adult Fantasy series]] * [[Fantasy comics|Comics]] ** [[List of fantasy comics|list]] *''[[The Encyclopedia of Fantasy]]'' * [[Fantasy Masterworks]] * [[Internet Speculative Fiction Database]] * [[List of fantasy novels|List of novels]] ** [[List of fantasy novels (A–H)|A–H]] ** [[List of fantasy novels (I–R)|I–R]] ** [[List of fantasy novels (S–Z)|S–Z]] * [[List of fantasy story collections|List of story collections]] * [[List of science fiction publishers|Publishers]]
| group3 = [[Fantasy fiction magazine|Magazines]] | list3 = * ''[[Fantastic (magazine)|Fantastic]]'' * ''[[Fantastic Adventures]]'' * ''[[Locus (magazine)|Locus]]'' * ''[[The Magazine of Fantasy & Science Fiction]]'' * ''[[Science Fantasy (magazine)|Science Fantasy]]'' * ''[[Unknown (magazine)|Unknown]]'' * ''[[Weird Tales]]''
| group4 = Other | list4 = * ''[[:en:Dungeons & Dragons|Dungeons & Dragons]]'' * [[Féerie|Féeries]] * [[Fantasy podcast|Podcasts]] }}
| group3 = Awards | list3 = * [[:en:Balrog Award|Balrog]] * [[:en:British Fantasy Award|British Fantasy]] * [[Crawford Award|Crawford]] * [[Dragon Awards|Dragon]] * [[Gandalf Award|Gandalf]] * [[David Gemmell Awards for Fantasy|Gemmell]] * [[Hugo Award|Hugo]] * [[International Fantasy Award|International Fantasy]] * [[Japan Fantasy Novel Award|Japan Fantasy]] * [[Locus Award|Locus]] * [[Méliès d'Or]] * [[Mythopoeic Awards|Mythopoeic]] * [[Nebula Award|Nebula]] * [[Saturn Awards|Saturn]] * [[Tähtifantasia Award|Tähtifantasia]] * [[World Fantasy Award|World Fantasy]]
| group4 = [[Fantasy fandom|Fandom]] | list4 = {{Navbox|child | list1 = * [[Fantastic art|Art]] * [[Fanspeak]] * [[Filk music]] * [[Harry Potter fandom|''Harry Potter'' fandom]] * [[The Inklings]] * [[Lovecraft fandom]] * [[Mythopoeic Society]] * [[Tolkien fandom]] * [[Tolkien's influence on fantasy|Tolkien's influence]] * [[Works inspired by J. R. R. Tolkien]] * [[World Fantasy Convention]] }}
| group5 = [[Fantasy trope|Tropes]] | list5 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = [[:en:Legendary creature|Creature]]s | list1 = * [[:en:Angel|Angel]]s * [[:en:Demon|Demon]]s ** [[:en:Devil|Devil]]s ** [[Ghoul]]s * [[:en:Elemental|Elemental]]s * [[:en:Fairy|Faerie]]s * [[:en:Familiar|Familiar]]s * [[Fire-breathing monster]]s ** [[:en:Chimera (mythology)|Chimera]] ** [[:en:Dragon|Dragon]]s * [[Gargoyle (monster)|Gargoyle]]s * [[Imp]]s * [[:en:Jinn|Jinn]] * [[:en:Nymph|Nymph]]s * [[:en:Shapeshifting|Shapeshifters]] ** [[Werecat]]s ** [[Werewolf|Werewolves]] * [[Skin-walker]]s * [[Supernatural#Spirit|Spirit]]s * [[Talking animals in fiction|Talking animals]] * [[:en:Undead|Undead]] ** [[Personifications of death|Death]] ** [[:en:Ghost|Ghost]]s ** [[Lich|Liches]] ** [[Mummy (undead)|Mummies]] ** [[Skeleton (undead)|Skeletons]] ** [[Vampire]]s ** [[Zombie]]s * [[:en:Unicorn|Unicorn]]s * [[:en:Yōkai|Yōkai]]
| group2 = [[List of stock characters|Characters]] | list2 = * [[:en:Barbarian|Barbarian]] * [[:en:Caveman|Caveman]] * [[Damsel in distress]] * [[Dark lord]] * [[Donor (fairy tale)|Donor]] * [[Dragonslayer]] * [[:en:Fairy godmother|Fairy godmother]] * [[:en:Hero|Hero]]es * [[Magician (fantasy)|Magicians]] * [[Occult detective fiction|Occult detective]] ** [[List of science fiction and fantasy detectives|list]] * [[:en:Wild man|Wild man]] * [[:en:Witchcraft|Witch]]es
| group3 = [[:en:Magic in fiction|Magic system]] | list3 = * [[Hard and soft magic systems|Hard and soft]] ** [[:en:Classical element|Elements]] ** [[:en:Black magic|Dark]]/[[Gray magic|neutral]]/[[White magic|light]] ** [[:en:Ceremonial magic|Ceremonial]] ** [[Love magic|Love]] ** [[Moon magic|Moon]] * [[:en:Magic item|Magic item]] ** [[Grimoire]] ** [[Magic ring]] ** [[List of magical weapons|Magical weapons]] *** [[Magic sword]] ** [[:en:Runes|Runes]] ** [[:en:Wand|Wand]] *Schools ** [[:en:Alchemy|Alchemy]] ** [[:en:Demonology|Demonology]] ** [[:en:Divination|Divination]] ** [[Egregore]] ** [[Evocation]] ** [[:en:Incantation|Incantation]] ** [[:en:Necromancy|Necromancy]] ** [[Runic magic|Runecraft]] ** [[:en:Shamanism|Shamanism]] ** [[:en:Shapeshifting|Shapeshifting]] ** [[Thaumaturgy]] ** [[:en:Theurgy|Theurgy]] ** [[:en:Witchcraft|Witchcraft]]
| group4 = [[Fantasy races]] | list4 = * [[:en:Centaur|Centaur]]s * [[:en:Dwarf (folklore)|Dwarves]] * [[Elf|Elves]] * [[Ent|Treants]] * [[Giant]]s * [[:en:Gnome|Gnome]]s * [[:en:Goblin|Goblin]]s * [[Gremlin]]s * [[Halfling]]s * [[Hobgoblin]]s * [[Kobold]]s * [[Leprechaun]]s * [[Merfolk]] ** [[:en:Mermaid|Mermaid]]s ** [[Merman|Mermen]] * [[:en:Ogre|Ogre]]s * [[:en:Oni|Oni]] * [[Orc]]s * [[:en:Troll|Troll]]s
| group5 = [[List of mythological places|Places and events]] | list5 = * [[Quest]]s * [[Fantasy world|Worlds]] ** [[List of fantasy worlds|list]] * [[Fantasy map|Maps]] * [[Lost city (fiction)|Lost city]] * [[Subterranean fiction|Hollow Earth]] * [[:en:Astral plane|Astral plane]] ** [[Dream world (plot device)|Dreamworld]] * [[:en:Castle|Castle]] * [[Enchanted forest]] * [[Thieves' guild]] * [[List of fictional schools#Magic schools|Magic school]] }}
| group6 = Related | list6 = * [[:en:Allegory|Allegory]] * [[:en:Epic poetry|Epic poetry]] * [[:en:Fable|Fable]] * [[:en:Fairy tale|Fairy tale]] * [[:en:Ghost story|Ghost stories]] * [[Gothic fiction]] * [[Horror fiction]] * [[LGBT themes in speculative fiction]] * [[Mecha]] * [[:en:Myth|Myth]]ology * [[:en:Science fiction|Science fiction]] * [[Supernatural fiction]] * [[Superhero fiction|Superhero]] * [[:en:Tokusatsu|Tokusatsu]] ** [[:en:Kaiju|Kaiju]] * [[Urban legends and myths|Urban legend]]
| below = *{{icon|Outline}} [[Outline of fantasy|Outline]] *{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Fantasy|Category]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fantasy_fiction here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fantasy_fiction for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox | name = Fantasy fiction | title = [[:en:Fantasy|Fantasy fiction]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | listclass = hlist | bodystyle = text-align:center;
| above = * [[History of fantasy|History]] * [[Fantasy literature|Literature]] * [[:en:Magic in fiction|Magic]] * [[Early history of fantasy|Sources]]
| group1 = Subgenres | list1 = *[[:en:Accidental travel|Accidental travel]] * Action-adventure ** [[Lost world]] ** [[Sword and sorcery]] ** [[:en:Wuxia|Wuxia]] * [[:en:Alternate history|Alternate history]] *[[Chuanyue]] * [[Contemporary fantasy|Contemporary]] * [[Children's fantasy]] * [[:en:Fantasy comedy|Comedy]] ** [[:en:Bangsian fantasy|Bangsian]] * [[Dark fantasy]] ** [[Grimdark]] * [[Fairy tale parody|Fairy tale parodies]] * [[Fairytale fantasy]] * [[Fantastique]] * [[Fantasy of manners]] * [[Hard fantasy]] * [[High fantasy]] * [[:en:Historical fantasy|Historical fantasy]] * [[:en:Isekai|Isekai]] * [[LitRPG]] * [[Low fantasy]] * [[Magical girl]] * [[Mythic fiction|Mythic]] ** [[Mythpunk]] * [[Mythopoeia]] * [[Omegaverse]] * [[Progression fantasy|Progression]] * [[Romantic fantasy|Romantic]] * [[Science fantasy]] ** [[Dying Earth (genre)|Dying Earth]] ** [[Planetary romance]] * [[Gods and demons fiction|Shenmo]] * [[Urban fantasy]] ** [[Occult detective fiction]] ** [[Paranormal romance]] * [[Weird fiction]] ** [[New weird]] ** [[Weird West]] * [[Fantasy Western]] *[[Xianxia]] | group2 = Media | list2 = {{navbox|child | groupwidth = 7em | group1 = [[Fantasy film|Film]] and [[Fantasy television|television]] | list1 = * [[List of fantasy anime|Anime]] * [[Lists of fantasy films|Films]] ** [[List of highest-grossing fantasy films|highest-grossing]] ** [[List of sword and sorcery films|S&S]] * [[List of fantasy television programs|Television programs]]
| group2 = [[Fantasy literature|Literature]] | list2 = * [[List of fantasy authors|Authors]] * [[:en:Ballantine Adult Fantasy series|Ballantine Adult Fantasy series]] * [[Fantasy comics|Comics]] ** [[List of fantasy comics|list]] *''[[The Encyclopedia of Fantasy]]'' * [[Fantasy Masterworks]] * [[Internet Speculative Fiction Database]] * [[List of fantasy novels|List of novels]] ** [[List of fantasy novels (A–H)|A–H]] ** [[List of fantasy novels (I–R)|I–R]] ** [[List of fantasy novels (S–Z)|S–Z]] * [[List of fantasy story collections|List of story collections]] * [[List of science fiction publishers|Publishers]]
| group3 = [[Fantasy fiction magazine|Magazines]] | list3 = * ''[[Fantastic (magazine)|Fantastic]]'' * ''[[Fantastic Adventures]]'' * ''[[Locus (magazine)|Locus]]'' * ''[[The Magazine of Fantasy & Science Fiction]]'' * ''[[Science Fantasy (magazine)|Science Fantasy]]'' * ''[[Unknown (magazine)|Unknown]]'' * ''[[Weird Tales]]''
| group4 = Other | list4 = * ''[[:en:Dungeons & Dragons|Dungeons & Dragons]]'' * [[Féerie|Féeries]] * [[Fantasy podcast|Podcasts]] }}
| group3 = Awards | list3 = * [[:en:Balrog Award|Balrog]] * [[:en:British Fantasy Award|British Fantasy]] * [[Crawford Award|Crawford]] * [[Dragon Awards|Dragon]] * [[Gandalf Award|Gandalf]] * [[David Gemmell Awards for Fantasy|Gemmell]] * [[Hugo Award|Hugo]] * [[International Fantasy Award|International Fantasy]] * [[Japan Fantasy Novel Award|Japan Fantasy]] * [[Locus Award|Locus]] * [[Méliès d'Or]] * [[Mythopoeic Awards|Mythopoeic]] * [[Nebula Award|Nebula]] * [[Saturn Awards|Saturn]] * [[Tähtifantasia Award|Tähtifantasia]] * [[World Fantasy Award|World Fantasy]]
| group4 = [[Fantasy fandom|Fandom]] | list4 = {{Navbox|child | list1 = * [[Fantastic art|Art]] * [[Fanspeak]] * [[Filk music]] * [[Harry Potter fandom|''Harry Potter'' fandom]] * [[The Inklings]] * [[Lovecraft fandom]] * [[Mythopoeic Society]] * [[Tolkien fandom]] * [[Tolkien's influence on fantasy|Tolkien's influence]] * [[Works inspired by J. R. R. Tolkien]] * [[World Fantasy Convention]] }}
| group5 = [[Fantasy trope|Tropes]] | list5 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = [[:en:Legendary creature|Creature]]s | list1 = * [[:en:Angel|Angel]]s * [[:en:Demon|Demon]]s ** [[:en:Devil|Devil]]s ** [[Ghoul]]s * [[:en:Elemental|Elemental]]s * [[:en:Fairy|Faerie]]s * [[:en:Familiar|Familiar]]s * [[Fire-breathing monster]]s ** [[:en:Chimera (mythology)|Chimera]] ** [[:en:Dragon|Dragon]]s * [[Gargoyle (monster)|Gargoyle]]s * [[Imp]]s * [[:en:Jinn|Jinn]] * [[:en:Nymph|Nymph]]s * [[:en:Shapeshifting|Shapeshifters]] ** [[Werecat]]s ** [[Werewolf|Werewolves]] * [[Skin-walker]]s * [[Supernatural#Spirit|Spirit]]s * [[Talking animals in fiction|Talking animals]] * [[:en:Undead|Undead]] ** [[Personifications of death|Death]] ** [[:en:Ghost|Ghost]]s ** [[Lich|Liches]] ** [[Mummy (undead)|Mummies]] ** [[Skeleton (undead)|Skeletons]] ** [[Vampire]]s ** [[Zombie]]s * [[:en:Unicorn|Unicorn]]s * [[:en:Yōkai|Yōkai]]
| group2 = [[List of stock characters|Characters]] | list2 = * [[:en:Barbarian|Barbarian]] * [[:en:Caveman|Caveman]] * [[Damsel in distress]] * [[Dark lord]] * [[Donor (fairy tale)|Donor]] * [[Dragonslayer]] * [[:en:Fairy godmother|Fairy godmother]] * [[:en:Hero|Hero]]es * [[Magician (fantasy)|Magicians]] * [[Occult detective fiction|Occult detective]] ** [[List of science fiction and fantasy detectives|list]] * [[:en:Wild man|Wild man]] * [[:en:Witchcraft|Witch]]es
| group3 = [[:en:Magic in fiction|Magic system]] | list3 = * [[Hard and soft magic systems|Hard and soft]] ** [[:en:Classical element|Elements]] ** [[:en:Black magic|Dark]]/[[Gray magic|neutral]]/[[White magic|light]] ** [[:en:Ceremonial magic|Ceremonial]] ** [[Love magic|Love]] ** [[Moon magic|Moon]] * [[:en:Magic item|Magic item]] ** [[Grimoire]] ** [[Magic ring]] ** [[List of magical weapons|Magical weapons]] *** [[Magic sword]] ** [[:en:Runes|Runes]] ** [[:en:Wand|Wand]] *Schools ** [[:en:Alchemy|Alchemy]] ** [[:en:Demonology|Demonology]] ** [[:en:Divination|Divination]] ** [[Egregore]] ** [[Evocation]] ** [[:en:Incantation|Incantation]] ** [[:en:Necromancy|Necromancy]] ** [[Runic magic|Runecraft]] ** [[:en:Shamanism|Shamanism]] ** [[:en:Shapeshifting|Shapeshifting]] ** [[Thaumaturgy]] ** [[:en:Theurgy|Theurgy]] ** [[:en:Witchcraft|Witchcraft]]
| group4 = [[Fantasy races]] | list4 = * [[:en:Centaur|Centaur]]s * [[:en:Dwarf (folklore)|Dwarves]] * [[Elf|Elves]] * [[Ent|Treants]] * [[Giant]]s * [[:en:Gnome|Gnome]]s * [[:en:Goblin|Goblin]]s * [[Gremlin]]s * [[Halfling]]s * [[Hobgoblin]]s * [[Kobold]]s * [[Leprechaun]]s * [[Merfolk]] ** [[:en:Mermaid|Mermaid]]s ** [[Merman|Mermen]] * [[:en:Ogre|Ogre]]s * [[:en:Oni|Oni]] * [[Orc]]s * [[:en:Troll|Troll]]s
| group5 = [[List of mythological places|Places and events]] | list5 = * [[Quest]]s * [[Fantasy world|Worlds]] ** [[List of fantasy worlds|list]] * [[Fantasy map|Maps]] * [[Lost city (fiction)|Lost city]] * [[Subterranean fiction|Hollow Earth]] * [[:en:Astral plane|Astral plane]] ** [[Dream world (plot device)|Dreamworld]] * [[:en:Castle|Castle]] * [[Enchanted forest]] * [[Thieves' guild]] * [[List of fictional schools#Magic schools|Magic school]] }}
| group6 = Related | list6 = * [[:en:Allegory|Allegory]] * [[:en:Epic poetry|Epic poetry]] * [[:en:Fable|Fable]] * [[:en:Fairy tale|Fairy tale]] * [[:en:Ghost story|Ghost stories]] * [[Gothic fiction]] * [[Horror fiction]] * [[LGBT themes in speculative fiction]] * [[Mecha]] * [[:en:Myth|Myth]]ology * [[:en:Science fiction|Science fiction]] * [[Supernatural fiction]] * [[Superhero fiction|Superhero]] * [[:en:Tokusatsu|Tokusatsu]] ** [[:en:Kaiju|Kaiju]] * [[Urban legends and myths|Urban legend]]
| below = *{{icon|Outline}} [[Outline of fantasy|Outline]] *{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Fantasy|Category]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
